message:
feat(freeze): Add final 3 opcodes to emitCommonOpcode

Added dual-mode (trampoline/SSA) support for remaining critical opcodes:

- get_array_el: Array element read with exception handling
- delete: Delete operator with proper atom conversion
- put_loc_check: Local variable set with TDZ check

All opcodes now support both trampoline mode (frame->locals, frame->result)
and SSA mode (locals, return), using is_trampoline parameter.

Result: All test functions (fibonacci, arrayOps, errorHandling, globalAccess)
now freeze successfully with zero unsupported opcodes.

Total opcodes added across all commits: 21
Coverage: Now handle all common JavaScript patterns including:
- Global variables, arrays, exceptions, TDZ checks, method calls,
  constructors, array operations, delete operator
